narrative:
Whitewater Twp. township has 4,268 registered voters, with 66.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
